title: Deakin University and Aikam (Telangana AI Innovation Hub) Sign Strategic MoU to Advance Applied AI, Skilling, Research and Innovation
description: Hyderabad (Telangana) [India], April 10: Deakin University, Australia, and the Government of Telangana, through Aikam™, today formalised a landmark partnership with the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to advance collaboration in applied artificial intelligence (AI), skilling, research, and innovation.

title: Make AI pay for the jobs it takes from people
description: Many are concerned about the potential threat that artificial intelligence (AI) poses to the economic security of current and future workers. In "MegaThreats" economist Nouriel Roubini writes: “The possibility is very real that a tiny top echelon will win while everybody else loses their jobs, their incomes, and their dignity.”

title: Watch: As AI Makes More Health Coverage Decisions, the Risks to Patients Grow
description: Major health insurers and even Medicare are using artificial intelligence to make coverage decisions. But class action lawsuits have accused insurers of using AI to wrongfully withhold treatment, and new research illuminates the risks.
content:
This year, executives from nearly every major health insurance company made the same declaration in calls with Wall Street analysts: Using artificial intelligence to make coverage decisions would help save them money.

title: AI could vastly streamline policing. Skeptics urge caution.
description: Police agencies are increasingly using artificial intelligence to help their criminal investigations. The results can be dramatic, but skeptics urge caution.
content:
Tools like Longeye could help police analyze documents much faster, but courts have not settled on when artificial intelligence’s role must be disclosed to the defense.

title: Taiwan March exports hit record high value as AI-related demand remains solid
description: Taiwan's exports rose much more than expected in March, with demand remaining strong for ​artificial intelligence applications and other technology products.
content:

title: It's crunch time for Malaysia to shift to AI-driven cities, says PM
description: KUALA LUMPUR: Malaysia is now at a critical juncture to transition from smart city development to artificial intelligence (AI) city development as the foundation for its aspiration to become an AI Nation, says Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim.
